🚀 Hiring: Senior AI/ML Engineer – Generative AI (Contract)
Looking for top-tier AI talent to work on cutting-edge LLM & Generative AI solutions for enterprise-scale applications.

💼 Role Details
• Experience: 10+ Years
• Contract: Minimum 1 Year (Extendable)
• Location: Remote (India)
• Budget: ₹1.5 – ₹1.7 LPM (All Inclusive)
• Joining: Immediate / 15 Days Max (Strict)

🧠 What We’re Looking For
✔ Strong expertise in Python & SQL
✔ Hands-on with ML frameworks: PyTorch / TensorFlow / Scikit-learn
✔ Deep experience in Generative AI ecosystem
– LangChain / LlamaIndex / HuggingFace
✔ Strong understanding of:
– LLMs, Prompt Engineering, Embeddings
– RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures
✔ Experience with Vector DBs:
– FAISS / Pinecone / Chroma
✔ Cloud experience: AWS / Azure / GCP
✔ Exposure to MLOps (MLflow, Docker, CI/CD pipelines)

⚡ What You’ll Work On
• Build LLM-powered applications (Chatbots, AI Copilots, Assistants)
• Design scalable RAG-based systems
• Develop end-to-end ML pipelines
• Deploy and optimize AI models on cloud
• Implement model monitoring & versioning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams

🔥 Why This Role Stands Out
• Work on real-world Generative AI use cases
• High-impact enterprise projects
• Flexible remote work
• Long-term contract opportunity

📩 Apply Now
Send your resume to: info@codiancloudtech.com

🚀 NEW OPPORTUNITY: Python FastAPI Engineer (ML + Risk Modeling)

📍 Location: Remote
⏰ Duration: Contract
🏢 Work Arrangement: remote
💰 Compensation: $63/hr (C2C · No Benefits)

📋 QUALIFICATIONS:
• 8-10

🛠️ REQUIRED SKILLS:
• Python
• FastAPI
• REST APIs
• Machine Learning
• risk scoring
• classification/regression
• unit/integration testing
• Git-based workflows
• +11 more skills

📋 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
• Design and develop REST APIs using Python + FastAPI to serve real time model scoring for individual loans/customers and support batch scoring workloads.
• Integrate APIs with upstream/downstream systems and ensure strong input validation and error handling.
• Support model hosting & execution for Python-based models and enable flexible deployment patterns
• Implement model operational capabilities: versioning/lineage, audit trails, reason codes/explainability hooks, and champion challenger support where needed.
• Build/enable observability: structured logging, metrics, tracing, and monitoring for performance, availability, and usage; help implement model performance/drift monitoring pipelines.

👉 Ready to join our innovative team?
Send your resume to: jay.v@itvisiongroup.com

Rahul Kumar

Talent Acquisition Specialist at Forcecraver Technologies

Urgently looking For Data Science Researcher - AI Platform	AI Data Science, ML, Python, Healthcare/Insurance	Preferred Skillset (Nice-to-Have)

Location - Channai

🚀 We’re Hiring: Data Science Researcher – AI Platform
📍 Location: Remote (India)
 ⏳ Experience: 7+ Years
 💼 Employment Type: Contract / Full-time
We are urgently looking for a Data Science Researcher to join our AI Platform team. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys solving ambiguous business problems using data, applying statistical rigor, and building impactful ML solutions—especially in the healthcare/insurance domain.
🔹 Key Responsibilities
• Design and execute end-to-end research studies on healthcare claims data
 • Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) on EDI 837/835 datasets
 • Identify patterns in denial rates, payer behavior & claim outcomes
 • Build, evaluate, and optimize ML models using Python (scikit-learn)
 • Define appropriate evaluation metrics (Precision, Recall, F1, AUC-ROC)
 • Apply statistical methods & causal inference techniques
 • Collaborate with data engineers for pipeline readiness
 • Translate findings into clear, actionable insights for stakeholders
 • Maintain experiment tracking, documentation & reproducibility
🔹 Required Skills
• Strong experience in Data Science, Machine Learning & Python
 • Hands-on with pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, Jupyter
 • Solid understanding of statistics: hypothesis testing, distributions, confidence intervals
 • Experience handling messy, real-world datasets
 • Ability to communicate insights clearly to technical & non-technical audiences
🔹 Nice to Have
• Experience in Healthcare / Insurance domain
 • Knowledge of EDI (837/835) & Revenue Cycle Management (RCM)
 • Familiarity with causal inference (DiD, PSM, Instrumental Variables)
 • Experience in Explainable/Interpretable ML
 • Background in statistics, mathematics, or quantitative fields
🔹 What We’re Looking For
✔ Strong problem-solving mindset
 ✔ Ability to convert ambiguity into structured analysis
 ✔ Focus on accuracy, transparency, and reproducibility
 ✔ Collaborative and research-driven approach



If interested please share your resume on my whatsaap no. +91 7290886364 or rahulk@forcecraver.com.

Follow Rahul Kumar for more job updates.

We are looking for an experienced Senior Data / Generative AI Engineer to join our Professional Services team on a contract basis and work on cutting-edge, production-grade AI solutions for global clients.
📍 Location: Remote
⏰ Shift: U.S. Time Zone (Evening/Night Shift – IST)
📌 Experience: 10+ Years

• Design and build production-ready Generative AI applications
• Develop RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) pipelines
• Build AI agents and multi-agent systems
• Work on AWS serverless architectures (Lambda, API Gateway, etc.)
• Develop REST APIs and real-time AI solutions

🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior Data Analytics / Data Science Professional 


Overall experience :7-12 Years
Notice period: Immediate to 30 Days
Location :Pan India (#Remote Position)
Job type: Contract position

🔍 Role Overview
 This is a high-impact individual contributor role (not a pure people manager position), ideal for someone who enjoys deep diving into data, building models, and delivering executive-level insights.

💡 Must-Have Skills:
• Strong experience in Data Analytics & Data Science
 • Hands-on expertise in Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn)
 • Advanced SQL & database fundamentals (Postgres / Oracle / MSSQL / MongoDB)
 • Expertise in Power BI / Tableau (dashboards, reporting, executive insights)
 • Experience with data pipelines (ingestion, transformation, automation)
 • Solid exposure to Machine Learning & Predictive Analytics
 • Working knowledge of Big Data tools (Hadoop, Spark, Hive)
 • Azure Cloud experience (mandatory)
 • Domain expertise in Financial Services / Fintech / Banking / Telecom
 • Experience working in Agile / DevOps environments

⭐ Key Skills :
• Advanced & predictive analytics
 • Data mining, forecasting & optimization models
 • BI reporting & executive dashboards
 • Statistical & quantitative modeling
 • ML use cases (fraud detection, risk analytics, customer behavior, A/B testing)
 • Strong stakeholder communication (including leadership level)
 • Experience handling large, complex datasets

🎯 What We’re Looking For
 A proactive, detail-oriented professional who can translate data into actionable insights and confidently interact with senior stakeholders.

extracted.role_summary: Hiring a Senior Data Analytics / Data Science Professional with 7-12 years experience for a remote, contract position in India, requiring expertise in Python, SQL, Power BI/Tableau, ML, Big Data, and Azure Cloud.

extracted.full_content:
Strive4X Infotech Private Limited

5,614 followers

🚀 Hiring: AI-Driven Data Engineer | PySpark + Databricks + GenAI | 5+ Years | Contract-to-Hire
We’re hiring to work with a reputed MNC! If you have strong modern data engineering + AI capabilities, this is a high-impact opportunity.
📍 Hybrid Locations: Most of the top tier1 (Preferred) and tier-2 cities in India  (Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Mysore, Kolkata, Bhubaneswar, Nagpur, Chandigarh, Gurgaon, Indore, Thiruvananthapuram, Jaipur etc. ). 
💼 Experience: 5+ Years
📄 Contract: 6+ Months (C2H)
🔧 Must Have
✔️ ETL/ELT pipeline development (real-time, large scale)
✔️ PySpark + Databricks (Delta Lake, workflows)
✔️ Advanced SQL (performance tuning)
✔️ Large datasets (GB–TB scale)
🧠 Data Engineering Practices
✔️ Data Lineage, Governance, Data Contracts
✔️ Data Quality (validation, monitoring)
✔️ Tools like Unity Catalog / Fabric
🤖 GenAI (Practical Experience Required)
✔️ LLMs (GPT/Open-source), Prompt Engineering
✔️ API integrations, real-world use cases
✔️ AI-assisted development (Copilot/Claude)
🚫 Do Not Apply If
❌ <5 yrs experience
❌ No PySpark/Databricks hands-on
❌ Only theoretical GenAI
📩 Apply: career@strive4x.net
Subject: AI Data Engineer | Your Name
📋 Include:
Name | Mobile | Location | Experience | CTC | Notice | PF | C2H Comfort
⚡ Immediate joiners preferred (≤15 days)
#DataEngineer #Databricks #PySpark #GenAI #LLM #HiringNow #TechJobsIndia #ContractToHire #AIJobs #OpenToWork
